name: MASS MEGAWATTS WIND POWER INC
business: Mass Megawatts' principal line of business is to develop a solar tracker for production to produce sales in the near term and wind energy production equipment for potential applications in the longer term. The company currently has only solar tracker prototypes for testing and has not achieved a final product for commercial production of wind power plants. It intends to build and operate wind energy power plants and sell the generated electricity to the power commodity exchange.

exposures.sentence: Mass Megawatts principal line of business is to develop a solar tracker for production to produce sales in the near term and wind energy production equipment for potential applications in the longer term.
The acceleration of the application of utility scale battery storage is increasing the opportunities for solar and wind power as a consistent and more reliable energy source.

tamClaims.sentence: Mass Megawatts Wind Power, Inc. (OTC: MMMW) is taking part of the $12 billion, US solar power market with the development of a new solar tracking technology that significantly increases the level of energy produced by solar power systems.

tamClaims.claim: 140,000 megawatts of opportunities with over 20% rate of return
tamClaims.sentence: Mass Megawatts has identified 140,000 megawatts worth of opportunities to earn more than 20% rate of return on the sale of electricity with investments of wind and solar energy.

tamClaims.claim: Solar tracker market 35% compound annual growth
tamClaims.sentence: The solar tracker market grew at a 35 percent compound annual growth.
